rulings.Case Title: OLUSOJI FANOIKI VS. 1081-1087 MISSISSIPPI STREET ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 21, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANTs BRIAN REED, and 1081-1087 MISSISSIPPI STREET HOMEOWNERS' Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action continued to November 8, 2019 for supplemental briefing. By no later than October 25, 2019 Defendants to file a supplemental brief addressing: 1. Whether criteria used for determination of applicability of arbitration clause to statutory claims is relevant to the Unruh and FEHA claims (Opposition 5:4-10); and assuming that it is whether the CC&Rs' arbitration clause meets the requirements. 2. Whether discovery propounded by Defendant was limited solely to the issues relevant to opposition to the motion for preliminary injunction. Defendant shall specifically address whether discovery was served in sufficient time to obtain responses prior to opposition to the preliminary injunction due date and whether any of the responses were used to support opposition. 3. Whether filing an ANTI-SLAPP is constitutes "invoking the litigation machinery." The brief shall be limited to the issues listed above. The entire brief will be stricken if its scope exceeds issues 1-3. Plaintiff may file a responsive brief by no later than November 1, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB, DBA VS. EMIL P. MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 21, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MAGDALENA APOSTOLOVA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND continued to November 12, 2019. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition no later than October 21, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Plaintiff and its counsel shall comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to do so will result in motions being treated as unopposed. = (501/CFH)
